name: mcp-config
description: Manager of MCP servers. Owns a single global JSON of {mcpServers: {...}} and reconciles by spawning / killing mcp-server children — one node per entry. The de-facto config shape is the same one Claude Desktop / Cursor / Cline use, so the same JSON works across clients. Validation is enforced before save (no partial writes). Kill this node and all its children stop.

default_subscriptions.description: Re-read this manager's mcpServers config and reconcile children.
Request the aggregated catalog of all tools across child mcp-server nodes. Reply on mcp.config.tools.
Call any aggregated tool by qualified name. Payload: {tool: "<alias>__<name>", args: {...}, reply_to?: "<topic>"}.
Replace the global mcpServers config and reconcile. Payload: {mcpServers: {...}}.
